label: Alert Box
description: A colored alert/notice. Use for evacuation warnings, red-flag days, or important announcements.

settings.label: Message
settings.default: Stay alert. Follow Poway Fire Dept guidance.

settings.message: RED FLAG WARNING. Critical fire weather conditions in effect. Evacuation may be ordered with little notice — review your go-bag and family plan now.
Upcoming event: 11th Annual Emergency & Safety Fair, May 31, 2025, 10am–2pm at Aubrey Park.
